description: Synthesize research into a complete creative strategy — positioning, messaging pillars, white space, ICP, and tagline options with rationale
usage: creative brief, brand positioning, brand strategy, messaging strategy, build a brand, positioning and taglines, creative strategy from research

target.description: The brand or product being positioned (e.g., 'DTC men's skincare brand', 'AI writing tool for lawyers')

audience.description: The target audience if not already defined in upstream research

findings.description: Upstream research findings from chained modules
